title: サトノ家として、ウマ娘として

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking by the academy gate one evening on
a day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Satono hasn't come back yet?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like it. Let's wait here a little
longer.
choice_data_list: Has something happened to Satono Diamond?
Has something happened to Satono Diamond?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're her trainer, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Palmer saw Satono leave this morning.
Apparently, she was heading off to her family's
company.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprised by what I'm hearing, I ask Mejiro Ryan
for more details. It seems Satono Diamond went
to one of the Satono family offices.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She apparently said she'd be back by evening,
but nobody's seen her yet, so we're starting to
worry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask them to leave this matter to me and then
give Satono Diamond a call.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hello? Trainer?
choice_data_list: Are you still at your family's office?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how that Mejiro Ryan and the others are
worried about her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I didn't mean to worry everyone. I'm okay,
though. I've just about wrapped up everything.
choice_data_list: It's pretty late, so I'll come pick you up.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? Okay, then I'll tell the front desk to
let you through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at the building Satono Diamond directs
me to, and head to the floor she's on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I don't see her, so I start looking around the area.

text_block_list.name: Satono Group Employee
text_block_list.text: What are we going to do about the charity race?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
First things first, we have to decide on a time and
place.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll speak to Mother and get an idea of how to
proceed before our meeting next week.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's do our best to attract as many people to the
event as possible. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The employee thanks Satono Diamond and
leaves.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer! You're here!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Our group is currently planning a charity race as
part of our philanthropic initiatives.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As both a member of the Satono family and an
Umamusume, I want to contribute in some way,
even if there's only so much I can do personally.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, her expression appears more
dignified than usual. I can tell she feels a strong
sense of duty in her role here.
choice_data_list:
Spoken like a true member of the Satono
family.

Spoken like a true member of the Satono
family.
Are you planning to compete as well?
Are you planning to compete as well?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, her expression appears more
dignified than usual. I can tell she feels a strong
sense of duty in her role here.
choice_data_list:
Spoken like a true member of the Satono
family.

Spoken like a true member of the Satono
family.
Are you planning to compete as well?
Are you planning to compete as well?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Why, thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I will stand at the head of the family one day, so
until that time comes, I think it would be wise to
broaden my horizons.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I'm always filled with the motivation to put
my best foot forward when I'm working on behalf
of the Satono family!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she smiles, it's apparent from her expression
how much pride she has in representing her
family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, welcome back! You look rather perky for
someone who just finished a long day of work.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As a Satono, it's my duty to be able to handle
these matters. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, it's just like Palmer said! You really are
like McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Do you really mean that?! I'd love to hear more!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I am indeed.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As I mentioned before, I am both a member of
the Satono family and an athlete.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I may still be inexperienced, but I hope to one
day make meaningful contributions to my family's
work and the world of racing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has her sights set not just on the
present, but further down the road as well. Her
eyes beam with the light of a promising future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, welcome back. How was work?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond tells her two friends about the
charity race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My, that sounds very interesting indeed! I'd love
to take part in the race too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're more than welcome to! We'd love to have
everyone from the Mejiro family join!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ And since I'm competing, I'll of course be
aiming to finish first.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course. It wouldn't be a race without some
good competition! I'll be giving it my all too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you're really like two peas in a pod.
Sounds like this'll be interesting...
